Name: IIS Website - Add Release Number to Response Header
Description: Adds the Octopus Deploy Release number to the IIS response header. When you browse your site you can look at the response header to verify the build number that is running.

Parameters.Name: headerFieldName
Parameters.Label: Field name
Parameters.HelpText: The name of the custom header field with the release information.

Parameters.Name: headerWebsiteName
Parameters.Label: Website name
Parameters.HelpText: The name of the website in IIS.
